graded_findings.rationale: The violation is locked:true, so it cannot be downgraded below blocking. Destructive command execution denied by policy is merge-blocking security substance.
The violation is locked:true, so it cannot be downgraded below blocking. Secret-tainted data flowing to a network send is a genuine exfiltration risk.
Unauthorized network egress reached the allowlist automaton error state on a network send. Even though it is not locked, this is a serious merge-blocking security risk.
